title: Dani California
why_this_song: Dani California by Red Hot Chili Peppers (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "California, rest in peace"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "She's a runner, rebel and a stunner"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "California, rest in peace"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "California, rest in peace"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Simultaneous release"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: She's my priestess, I'm your priest
Gettin' born in the state of Mississippi
Papa was a copper and mama was a hippie
In Alabama she would swing a hammer
Price you gotta pay when you break the panorama

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "california" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "california" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "she's" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Gettin' born in the state of Mississippi
With a name like Dani California

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In Alabama she would swing a hammer
Never made it up to Minnesota

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Red Hot Chili Peppers one question about "Dani California", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Red Hot Chili Peppers sobre "Dani California", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Dani California" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Dani California" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Dani California" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Dani California" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
